displayTitle: Han Solo: Imperial Cadet Part II
synopsis: THE HUNTER AND THE HUNTED! After spending a night in the brig, HAN SOLO is given one last shot at flight school… Will Han be top gun, or will he crash and burn? Crash and burn if one of his top competitors gets his way! This mysterious rival is ripped from the pages of CLASSIC STAR WARS COMICS!
title: Han Solo: Imperial Cadet Part II
